title: B1 speaking exam: picture description
subtitle: Describe and speculate from an image.
overview: Use what you see, what may be happening, and your opinion.
Do not freeze if you lack exact vocabulary.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: In the image one can see...
Me da la impresión de que...
It gives me the impression that...

items.es: En la imagen se ve a una familia en una cocina.
items.en: In the image one can see a family in a kitchen.

items.es: Parece que están preparando la cena juntos.
items.en: It seems that they are preparing dinner together.

items.es: Puede que sea un fin de semana porque todos parecen tranquilos.
items.en: It may be a weekend because everyone seems calm.

items.es: Me da la impresión de que tienen una relación cercana.
items.en: It gives me the impression that they have a close relationship.

items.es: La escena me parece cotidiana, pero agradable.
items.en: The scene seems everyday, but pleasant to me.
